title: Algerian Chicken and Tomato Stew
description: A flavorful and aromatic stew originating from Algeria, made with tender chicken, fresh tomatoes, and a blend of spices.

ingredients.name: algerian spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at most Middle Eastern markets

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the pot and set aside.
Add the onion and garlic to the pot and cook until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced tomatoes, Algerian spice blend, and sour oranges to the pot.
Stir to combine, then add the browned chicken back to the pot.
Bring the stew to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, until the chicken is cooked through and the flavors have melded together, about 20-25 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
